Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Continued To Dec-10-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Stacie Nelson for American Red Cross
Michelle Domingo for Armilyn Bowen, estate of Rosallie Cocjin
Kevin Rodriguez for petitioner

Mr. Rodriguez stated parties have reached a settlement, signed a memorandum of understanding, need to finalize the agreement and set it for court approval. The petition to determine validity of trust restatement and trust amendments is continued to December 10, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

**Petition for court approval of settlement agreement to be set on same court date when submitted for filing. Court clerk instructed parties to add note to clerk on efiling transaction regarding this date preference.**

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Oct-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Rodriguez for Jane Plank (Petitioner).
Michelle Domingo for Armilyn Bowen (Personal Representative of The Estate of Rosalie Cocjin).
Kyong Kim for American Red Cross (Beneficiary).

Mr. Rodriguez stated that the tentative settlement agreement was a year and a half ago, that they now have mediation scheduled for October 10th, that they hope to reach resolution, and that if not, they will come back and set the matter for trial. Mr. Rodriguez also stated that most of the written discovery has been done and that they have held off on a couple of depositions. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Restatement, etc. is continued to October 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Continued To Jul-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Rodriguez for petitioner Jane Plank; Scott Nelson for the American Red Cross; Michelle Domingo for the Estate of Rosalie Cocjin.

Mr. Rodriguez reported that discovery is underway, but that matters had been substantially delayed by the death of one of the parties. He suggested that the matter be continued to allow time for completion of discovery and proceeding to mediation. He opined that it would require 180 days to complete that process. Ms. Nelson stated her preference to move the case along and limit the continuance to June 4, 2018. Ms. Domingo agreed that a 90-day continuance was appropriate. The matter was continued to July 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Advanced From Nov-16-17 To Nov-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Continued To Mar-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Monica Dell'Osso for Jane Plank.
Stacie Nelson for American Red Cross.
Michelle Domingo for Armilyn Bowen (Personal Representative for the Estate of Rosalie L. Cocjin).

Ms. Dell'Osso stated that they had a tentative settlement agreement prior to Ms. Cocjin's death, that they do not have acceptance from the Personal Representative, and asked for time to do discovery and proceed with a trial. Ms. Domingo stated that she has not had a chance to review the settlement agreement, that she has requested a copy of it, and that she had discussion with Mr. Rodriguez about reviewing it this week and getting back to him next week. Ms. Nelson stated that she is not sure how much discovery they would need to do and suggested mediation. The Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Restatement and Trust Amendments is continued to March 5, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery, mediation and setting of a trial date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Chu. Not reported.

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Nov-16-17 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Validity Of Trust Restatement And Trust Amendments
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To Aug-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Property Belonging To Trust
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Monica Dell'Osso for (petitioner) Jane Plank. Gary Rothstein for (petitioner) Wells Fargo Bank. Stacie Nelson for (beneficiary) American Red Cross. Roger Jackson, specially appearing for Robert Borris for (objector) Rosalie Cocjin.

The Court asked if the parties are ready to mediate. Ms. Dell'Osso stated that an opposition was e-filed but not verified and that they want it struck. Mr. Jackson stated that he does not wish to comment on that. The Court confirmed that the document was not verified. Ms. Dell'Osso stated that there is no opposition but the American Red Cross and that they want a 90 day continuance to conduct discovery. Mr. Rothstein asked if the Heggstad petition could be separated from the other petition. Ms. Dell'Osso confirmed that it should be separate. The Court took the Petition to Determine Property Belonging to Trust under submission. Ms. Nelson stated that they would like to avoid coming back too soon and requested that the continuance be 120 days and that they will have mediated by that date. The Court set a mediation deadline of May 1, 2017 and continued the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Restatement and Trust Amendments to May 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
